bottom_line: The collision between 'agent modifies orch schema' and 'agent must call back via iw CLI' was invisible at design time — add a boundary-failure prompt to the Issue design template.
coverage_notes: Sampled tail (last 50–100 lines) of all large logs (S01, S03, S05, S02 runs 1–3, S13 fix cycles 1–5). Read S06_run1, S06_run6, S07_run1, S13_run1, S14_run1 in full. DB telemetry: full (iw db-identity check returned UP, item-status confirmed item state). Fix-cycle prompt files read to understand diagnostic hypothesis progression. Worktree was deleted by S14 but active dir logs were at absolute path .worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/.

findings.title: Schema-drift collision invisible at design time
findings.recommendation: Add a 'failure modes at the agent–orch boundary' subsection to the Issue design template. When the fix requires the agent to modify orch-level files, prompt the author to ask 'can the agent still call iw step-done after these changes?'
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00073/I-00073_Issue_Design.md — no mention of 'what happens when the agent finishes and tries to call back to the orch DB' despite the entire bug being that exact scenario
.worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/I-00073_S13_fix5.log:397 — 'Removed `s.gate` from `item-status` JSON serialization' — final fix was a one-liner after 5 cycles of searching
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add 'failure modes at the agent–orch boundary' subsection to templates/design/Issue_Design_Template.md; analyzed in I-00073 self-assess (see ai-dev/work/I-00073/reports/I-00073_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/Issue_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: item-status JSON builder bypassed load_only column set
findings.recommendation: Audit orch/cli/item_commands.py for any attribute access on workflow-step objects outside the pinned _WORKFLOW_STEP_CLI_COLUMNS set. Ensure every .gate, .description, .prompt_file etc. access is covered by the column list or loaded explicitly.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Audit orch/cli/item_commands.py for attribute accesses on WorkflowStep objects outside _WORKFLOW_STEP_CLI_COLUMNS; analyzed in I-00073 self-assess (see ai-dev/work/I-00073/reports/I-00073_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/cli/item_commands.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: S13 integration-tests fix-cycle needed 5 iterations due to non-obvious symptom
findings.recommendation: When integration-tests gate fails with many heterogeneous ERRORs across unrelated test files (merge-queue, FTS, reindex), the fix-cycle prompt should specifically call out 'pre-existing failures' as a hypothesis to check before assuming the new code is at fault.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/I-00073_S13_fix1.log:282 — 343 failed tests, many ERRORs in merge-queue and FTS tests
.worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/I-00073_S13_fix5.log:27498 — fix was 'Removed `s.gate` from `item-status` JSON serialization' after 5 cycles
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add 'check for pre-existing failures' to fix-cycle prompt guidance in skills/iw-execute/SKILL.md; analyzed in I-00073 self-assess (see ai-dev/work/I-00073/reports/I-00073_self_assess_report.md). Target: skills/iw-execute/SKILL.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: QV lint/format gates failed on code the Tests agent added
findings.recommendation: Add 'run `make lint && make format` before marking step done' to S03 (Tests) agent prompt, since new test files must pass project style gates.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/I-00073_S06_fix1.log:9 — 'E402 Module level import not at top of file'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-feature Add lint/format pre-flight to S03 Tests agent prompt; analyzed in I-00073 self-assess (see ai-dev/work/I-00073/reports/I-00073_self_assess_report.md). Target: ai-dev/templates/Feature_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S02 CodeReview required 2 fix cycles to fully verify drift-test suite
findings.recommendation: S02 (CodeReview) prompt for tests should explicitly require the reviewer to run `pytest tests/integration/cli/test_step_commands_drift.py --no-cov` and confirm all 9 tests pass, not just verify code exists.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00073/ai-dev/logs/I-00073_S02_fix1.log:27 — only 1 of 9 drift tests passed initially
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-feature Add pytest execution requirement to S02 CodeReview prompt for test steps; analyzed in I-00073 self-assess (see ai-dev/work/I-00073/reports/I-00073_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/Feature_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.
